name: Harvia Oyj
summary: Harvia Oyj, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes traditional, steam, and infrared saunas. The company offers sauna heaters, sauna rooms, control units, and steam generators; sauna heater spare parts, sauna stones, hot water containers, steam room elements, sauna lighting solutions, and waterproof sauna speakers; and sauna accessories, such as sauna scents, buckets, ladles, and thermometers. It also provides wood-heated saunas; precut saunas and saunas interior products; ready-made saunas; infrared cabins and tailor-made infrared saunas; spa products, including spa modules and accessories, steam generators, and luminous; and cooking and home heating products. In addition, the company offers sauna installation, maintenance, and repair services; and infrared radiators and sauna equipment. Further, it engages in real estate business. The company offers its products to retailers and wholesalers through a network of dealers. It operates in Finland, Germany, other Scandinavia countries, other EU countries, Russia, North America, and internationally. Harvia Oyj was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Muurame, Finland.
